title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official CLI and server for running large language models locally with a simple API and Docker-style model management.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python client library that wraps the Ollama REST API for chat, generate, embed, pull, and list operations.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript SDK for Node and browsers to interact with the Ollama server.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration providing LLM, chat, and embeddings wrappers that talk to a local Ollama instance.

title: ollama-webui
summary: ChatGPT-style web UI that connects to any Ollama server for chatting, model management, and multi-user workspaces.

title: ollama4j
summary: Community Java/Kotlin client offering fluent builders for chat, generate, pull, and embedding endpoints.

title: ollama-rb
summary: Ruby gem that wraps the Ollama REST API with idiomatic Ruby objects and streaming support.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Cross-platform TUI (terminal UI) written in Rust for chatting with Ollama models without leaving the shell.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: Visual Studio Code extension that brings local Ollama models into the editor as inline copilots and chat panels.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Helm chart to deploy Ollama server and models on Kubernetes clusters with GPU node selection.

title: ollama-docker
summary: Official container images (CPU & GPU) and docker-compose examples for running Ollama in production.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration by deepset allowing Ollama models to be used as generators or embedders in pipelines.

title: ollama-csharp
summary: Community .NET SDK providing strongly-typed clients for chat, generate, and embeddings endpoints with IAsyncEnumerable streaming.

title: ollama-gui
summary: Lightweight Flutter desktop app for chatting with Ollama models on Windows, macOS, and Linux.

title: ollama-discord
summary: Discord bot that lets server members chat with any Ollama model through slash commands and threads.

title: ollama-nix
summary: Nix derivation that builds Ollama from source with optional CUDA and ROCm acceleration.

title: ollama-dagger
summary: Dagger module for CI pipelines that spins up ephemeral Ollama services to test LLM integrations.

title: ollama-rust
summary: Community Rust crate exposing async/await wrappers for chat, generate, pull, and list endpoints.

title: ollama-obsidian
summary: Obsidian plugin that adds a local AI sidebar powered by Ollama for summarizing notes and answering questions.

title: ollama-slack
summary: Slack bot that integrates Ollama models into channels via socket mode and supports app mentions and DM chat.
